Description: Defines Lambda function(s) for the application.

ProjectName.Description: A name for the project, used to prefix resource names.

LambdaHandler.Description: The name of the method within your code that Lambda calls to execute your function.

LambdaRuntime.Description: The runtime environment for the Lambda function.

LambdaCodeS3Bucket.Description: S3 bucket where the Lambda deployment package is stored.

LambdaCodeS3Key.Description: S3 key for the Lambda deployment package (.zip file).

LambdaExecutionRoleArn.Description: ARN of the IAM role that Lambda assumes when it executes your function.

BranchName.Description: The current Git branch name, for tagging.

LambdaFunctionArn.Description: ARN of the created Lambda function

LambdaFunctionNameOutput.Description: Name of the created Lambda function
